channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 6
item.description: A handful of major upsets in college football left fans either in awe or in tears. Alabama and Tennessee were among the team shocked on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Special teams swing after Moody’s injury helped sink 49ers vs. Cardinals
item.description: The high of Deommodore Lenoir's 61-yard return of a blocked field goal was followed by an injury that put place kicker Jake Moody out of the game.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Stenhouse snaps 65-race losing streak after late crash at Talladega scrambles playoff picture
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (AP) — A 27-car crash that involved eight of NASCAR's 12 title contenders. A chaotic cleanup that infuriated competitors. And a surprise winner. Just a regular race at Talladega Superspeedway. Ricky Stenhouse Jr.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kevin Yu birdies 18th twice and wins Sanderson Farms in playoff for first PGA Tour title
item.description: JACKSON, Miss. (AP) — Kevin Yu made a 15-foot birdie on the 18th hole for a 5-under 67, and he birdied it again from 6 feet in a playoff to beat Beau Hossler and win the Sanderson Farms Championship on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbling back outside and flipping the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: Steve Reed, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kyler Murray rallies the Cardinals past the 49ers, 24-23
item.description: Kyler Murray had a long touchdown run in the first quarter and rallied Arizona with two fourth-quarter scoring drives in the Cardinals’ 24-23 victory over the San Francisco 49ers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Browns' Deshaun Watson leaves coach flabbergasted during crucial 4th down in loss vs Commanders
item.description: Cleveland Browns quarterback Deshaun Watson left head coach Kevin Stefanski disappointed after he decided to walk toward the sideline on 4th-and-goal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vikings hold off Rodgers and the Jets for 23-17 win in London to improve to 5-0
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Aaron Rodgers had a message for Andrew Van Ginkel after the Vikings linebacker returned an interception 63 yards for a touchdown. “He told me, too, ‘Christmas came early’ for me,” the humble Van Ginkel said. “I just told him ‘thank you.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aggies get run over by Boise State, 62-30
item.description: BOISE (ABC4 Sports) - Ashton Jeanty ran for 186 yards and three touchdowns on 13 first-half carries, while former American Fork High School quarterback Maddux Madsen passed for 256 yards and three TDs and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jets add QB Adrian Martinez to roster for game against Vikings
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The New York Jets have activated third-string quarterback Adrian Martinez for Sunday’s game against the Minnesota Vikings at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Martinez would serve as an emergency quarterback behind starter Aaron Rodgers and backup Tyrod Taylor.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Clayton Kershaw won't pitch for the Dodgers in playoffs after big toe injury fails to heal
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Clayton Kershaw, sidelined since late August with a toe injury, won’t pitch again this season for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets' win sends ticket prices soaring for playoff matchup with Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) --- Pete Alonso's three-run homer sent the New York Mets to a showdown with division rival Philadelphia -- and playoff ticket prices soaring.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Backlash over San Jose State University transgender volleyball player 'isn't about sports,' advocates say
item.description: (KRON) -- Four teams forfeited matches against the San Jose State University women's volleyball team since a lawsuit was filed on behalf of several NCAA athletes, including SJSU's team captain. According to the lawsuit filed on September 23, one of SJSU's volleyball players is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Bucs remain banged up but carry confidence into Thursday's Falcons clash
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are riding momentum into Thursday night’s NFC South clash with the Atlanta Falcons but so far, the short game week has presented many challenges.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lightning prospects fight for roster spots ahead of Panthers preseason matchup
item.description: Preseason means players fighting for a roster spot get a chance to impress coaches. Center Conor Geekie is one of those players who head coach Jon Cooper thinks highly of.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: From food to murder, Aaron Rodgers talks all things Berkeley ahead of College GameDay appearance
item.description: (KRON) -- The college football world will have its eyes on Berkeley this weekend as Cal hosts ESPN's famous College GameDay show for the first time before its game against No. 8 Miami on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: RSL looks to solidify playoff seeding against Minnesota
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has already clinched an MLS playoff spot, but considering RSL is 6-1-2 all-time at home in the postseason, they want that home field advantage in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Jazz veterans hope to lead young core
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - There are no less than ten players 23 years of age or younger currently on the Utah Jazz roster. So for veterans like Jordan Clarkson, they know their role as leaders is invaluable.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dikembe Mutombo, a Hall of Fame player and tireless advocate, dies at 58 from brain cancer
item.description: Dikembe Mutombo, a Basketball Hall of Famer who was one of the best defensive players in NBA history and a longtime global ambassador for the game, died Monday from brain cancer, the league announced. He was 58.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs prep for Falcons in Primetime TNF after big win over Eagles
item.description: After beating the Philadelphia Eagles the Tampa Bay Buccaneers now lead the NFC South with a 3-1 record.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC
